notes: Slice 3 end-to-end proof brief. Two new motion goals derived from natural-language scenes via the S-5 motion brief prompt flow. Both reference newly-added presets in src/pipeline/motion_recipe.py (DEFAULT_RECIPE_PRESETS).

recipes.motion_goal: Realization beat: brief zoom-in spike followed by a slow nod.
recipes.scene_input: ふと何かに気づいて、軽く目を見開いてからゆっくり頷く

recipes.motion_goal: Sustained sad tilt with screen blur for despondent stillness.
recipes.scene_input: 落ち込んで体を傾けたまま、ぼんやり画面がぼやける
